title: More Enchants
description: Upgrade your Minecraft experience with MORE ENCHANTMENTS! - Armor, Weapons, Tools
body:
## Welcome to [More Enchants]
The Datapack/Mod that will upgrade your experience!

### Instruction (If You want to download for just the world)
- Click on DOWNLOAD
- Select a Version
- Select Platform (DATAPACK)
- Create new world
- Press More Button
- Press "Data Packs"
- OPEN PACK FOLDER and put the datapack inside

### Look at [CHANGELOG](https://modrinth.com/datapack/moreenchantments/changelog) for more information about the enchantments.

## Newly added Enchantments
- Dolphin's Grace Enchantment: Can be applied to Sword.
- Falling Wings Enchantment: Can be applied to Boots.

## Changes:
- You can became more bigger with Curse Of Giantism for each armor piece.
- You can became more smaller with Curse Of Smallism for each armor peice.

## Old Enchantments:

- Block Reach Enchantment: Can be applied to a Turtle Helmet.
- Entity Reach Enchantment: Can be applied to a Turtle Helmet.
- Glow Enchantment: Can be applied to Swords.
- Big Foot Enchantment: Can be applied to Boots.
- LifeSteal Enchantment: Can be applied to Swords.
- Wither Enchantment: Can be applied to Swords.
- Attack Speed Enchantment: Can be applied to Swords.
- Burning Protection Enchantment: Can be applied to Armor.
- Curse of Giantism Enchantment: Can be applied to Armor.
- Curse of Smallism Enchantment: Can be applied to Armor.
- Gravity Enchantment: Can be applied to Armor.
- Haste Enchantment: Can be applied to Tools.
- Hearthy Enchantment: Can be applied to Armor.
- Jump Enchantment: Can be applied to Boots.
- Speed Enchantment: Can be applied to Boots.
- Knockback Protection Enchantment: Can be applied to Armor.
- Strength Enchantment: Can be applied to Armor.
- Shulker Enchantment: Can be applied to Boots.
- Villager Healer Enchantment: Can be applied to Emerald.
- Invisibility Enchantment: Can be applied to Swords.
- Frozen Enchantment: Can be applied to Swords.

## Any enchantment can be obtained from enchantment table and trading.
### Only CURSE OF GIANTISM, CURSE OF SMALLISM, VILLAGER HEALER, FROZEN and INVISIBILITY are only TRADING.
